TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == bihid ku sakatineng nu kikay ŤáČťÉ®Ťĺ®Ť≠ėÁ≥ĽÁĶĪ == bihid ku sakatineng nu kikay "igu Facial recognition system", sipangangan u bihid ku sakatineng, bihid ku sakasitineng. picidekan micukaymas tu sakakenisan tu bihid nu tademaw aadihan nu wayway milihida tu udip a tennaw nu gigicuan. . sasingenanay ku sakasitineng nu kikay ŤáČťÉ®Ťĺ®Ť≠ėśĒĚŚĹĪś©ü nayaten nu imian bihid tu sakasitineng pasu kaku nu bihidan atu sakalecad nu gigicuan, pasubihid nu kaku, saluimeng sananay nu bihidan, misakapah tu bihitan, tatenga isu haw sananay atu mikilim tu udip, saadidien nu imian bihid nu sakasitineng u milakuuytay tu bihid a kakuan atu mikilim tu udip a gigicuan. . bihid ku sakasitineng u aydaay nu ten-naw sakakaay a gigicuan, u sakay cilekayan tu sakasitineng nu picidekan a gigicuan, sakay cilecilekayan " sakay tademaw" sipakayda i udip nu picidekan ku sakakenis tu cilekayan. sakay picidekan nu cilakay nu gigicuan tu sapikinkiw a cilekay picidekan pasu bihid, lima, kapal, mata, salengacay nu mataan, suni "ngalngal", kaku nu udip, wayway nu udip " mahida u nipituktukan tu ten-naw a icelang atu wenpu, nipisulitan", sakalecad nu gigicuan u bihid tu sakasitineng, lima sakasitinengan, lima sakasitinengan, mata sakasitinengan, salengac nu sakasitinengan, suni sakasitinengan, kaku nu udip a sakasitinengan, nipituktuk a sakasitinengan, sulit sakasitinengan. hicasa ku pakunida hananay, sakatineng mahida malecad atu tademaw, papicumud u udip tu sapicukaymas a canancanan nu sakalecad. mahida u bihid tu sakatineng, u tademaw sipakayda tu nipiadih tu bihidan nu nikakenihan atu sapilucek tu udip, duma satu sapakayda tu lihalay nu sakasitinengan idaw henay ku sakayngalngal nu sakasitinengan, wayway nu udip, sulit nu lima, sakay mata tu sakasitinengan sakacaay sa namin kasalihalay, ita u tademaw atu cilekay caay piala tu mahiniay nu picidekan a masacacayan. . caay kaw kakatinengan a picidekan tu sakasitineng, mahiniay caay kahinabelih ku tademaw, nu mahiniay caay kaw sapidateng nutaw caay ka hinapacebaan. sakay bihid nu sakasitinengn a picidekan, sipakayda i takelalay misasing kay maala ku kaku nu bihid, caay kahida u lima atu mata ku sakasitineng, amicukaymas tu ten-ce-ya-li ku sapikinsa tu lima, hakiya micukaymas tu hung-way-sin miala tu mata nu kakuan, mahiniay nu picidekan hina kaalaan nu tademaw, hakiya taneng pacebaan nutaw amica u bihid ku sakasitineng nika yadah henay ku caayay pikikaka tu mahiniay, nika ci nida idaw ku sakautiihan. . kalawlawan Áą≠Ť≠į amica kunikalihalay u bihid ku sakasitinengan, nika yadah tu ku sakatalawan nu nai'ay a ancinan atu sakay udip nu wendayan, macunus nu aydaay nu bihid ku sakasitineng caay kaw malucekay, nisausian nu mahiniay a kikayan caay kaw malucekay, hina patelac, kainai'an tu sakay hulican atu sakay tademawan nu lucekan, idaw ku midebungay nu nikasasakamuen, atu sihu paceba sa micukaymas tu mahiniay a gigicuan, anu sipakayda tu sicumian mikawaw, a yadah ku masahicahicaay nu wendayan. .
S.PHON: == bińßid ku sakatin…ôŇč nu kikaj ****** == bińßid ku sakatin…ôŇč nu kikaj "igu fa ¶iar~…ĺ r…ô ¶ognition sjst…ôm", sipaŇčaŇčan u bińßid ku sakatin…ôŇč, bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇč. pi ¶id…ôkan mi ¶ukajmas tu sakak…ônisan tu bińßid nu tad…ômaw aadińßan nu wajwaj mir~…ĺińßida tu udip a t…ônnaw nu gigi ¶uan. . sasiŇč…ônanaj ku sakasitin…ôŇč nu kikaj ******* najat…ôn nu imian bińßid tu sakasitin…ôŇč pasu kaku nu bińßidan atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu gigi ¶uan, pasubińßid nu kaku, sar~…ĺuim…ôŇč sananaj nu bińßidan, misakapańß tu bińßitan, tat…ôŇča isu ńßaw sananaj atu mikir~…ĺim tu udip, saadidi…ôn nu imian bińßid nu sakasitin…ôŇč u mir~…ĺakuujtaj tu bińßid a kakuan atu mikir~…ĺim tu udip a gigi ¶uan. . bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇč u ajdaaj nu t…ôn-naw sakakaaj a gigi ¶uan, u sakaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan tu sakasitin…ôŇč nu pi ¶id…ôkan a gigi ¶uan, sakaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ô ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan " sakaj tad…ômaw" sipakajda i udip nu pi ¶id…ôkan ku sakak…ônis tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan. sakaj pi ¶id…ôkan nu ¶ir~…ĺakaj nu gigi ¶uan tu sapikinkiw a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj pi ¶id…ôkan pasu bińßid, r~…ĺima, kapar~…ĺ, mata, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu mataan, suni "Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ", kaku nu udip, wajwaj nu udip " mańßida u nipituktukan tu t…ôn-naw a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu w…ônpu, nipisur~…ĺitan", sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu gigi ¶uan u bińßid tu sakasitin…ôŇč, r~…ĺima sakasitin…ôŇčan, r~…ĺima sakasitin…ôŇčan, mata sakasitin…ôŇčan, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu sakasitin…ôŇčan, suni sakasitin…ôŇčan, kaku nu udip a sakasitin…ôŇčan, nipituktuk a sakasitin…ôŇčan, sur~…ĺit sakasitin…ôŇčan. ńßi ¶asa ku pakunida ńßananaj, sakatin…ôŇč mańßida mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu tad…ômaw, papi ¶umud u udip tu sapi ¶ukajmas a ¶anan ¶anan nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. mańßida u bińßid tu sakatin…ôŇč, u tad…ômaw sipakajda tu nipiadińß tu bińßidan nu nikak…ônińßan atu sapir~…ĺu ¶…ôk tu udip, duma satu sapakajda tu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu sakasitin…ôŇčan idaw ńß…ônaj ku sakajŇčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ nu sakasitin…ôŇčan, wajwaj nu udip, sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺima, sakaj mata tu sakasitin…ôŇčan saka ¶aaj sa namin kasar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, ita u tad…ômaw atu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ¶aaj piar~…ĺa tu mańßiniaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan a masa ¶a ¶ajan. . ¶aaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan a pi ¶id…ôkan tu sakasitin…ôŇč, mańßiniaj ¶aaj kańßinab…ôr~…ĺińß ku tad…ômaw, nu mańßiniaj ¶aaj kaw sapidat…ôŇč nutaw ¶aaj ka ńßinapa ¶…ôbaan. sakaj bińßid nu sakasitin…ôŇčn a pi ¶id…ôkan, sipakajda i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj misasiŇč kaj maar~…ĺa ku kaku nu bińßid, ¶aaj kańßida u r~…ĺima atu mata ku sakasitin…ôŇč, ami ¶ukajmas tu t…ôn- ¶…ô-ja-r~…ĺi ku sapikinsa tu r~…ĺima, ńßakija mi ¶ukajmas tu ńßuŇč-waj-sin miar~…ĺa tu mata nu kakuan, mańßiniaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan ńßina kaar~…ĺaan nu tad…ômaw, ńßakija tan…ôŇč pa ¶…ôbaan nutaw ami ¶a u bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇč nika jadańß ńß…ônaj ku ¶aajaj pikikaka tu mańßiniaj, nika ¶i nida idaw ku sakautiińßan. . kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ** ami ¶a kunikar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj u bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇčan, nika jadańß tu ku sakatar~…ĺawan nu nai Ē~ °aj a an ¶inan atu sakaj udip nu w…ôndajan, ma ¶unus nu ajdaaj nu bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇč ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj, nisausian nu mańßiniaj a kikajan ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj, ńßina pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶, kainai Ē~ °an tu sakaj ńßur~…ĺi ¶an atu sakaj tad…ômawan nu r~…ĺu ¶…ôkan, idaw ku mid…ôbuŇčaj nu nikasasakamu…ôn, atu sińßu pa ¶…ôba sa mi ¶ukajmas tu mańßiniaj a gigi ¶uan, anu sipakajda tu si ¶umian mikawaw, a jadańß ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu w…ôndajan. .
S.FORM: == bihid ku sakatineng nu kikay ŤáČťÉ®Ťĺ®Ť≠ėÁ≥ĽÁĶĪ == bihid ku sakatineng nu kikay "igu Facial recognition system", sipangangan u bihid ku sakatineng, bihid ku sakasitineng. picidekan micukaymas tu sakakenisan tu bihid nu tademaw aadihan nu wayway milihida tu udip a tennaw nu gigicuan. . sasingenanay ku sakasitineng nu kikay ŤáČťÉ®Ťĺ®Ť≠ėśĒĚŚĹĪś©ü nayaten nu imian bihid tu sakasitineng pasu kaku nu bihidan atu sakalecad nu gigicuan, pasubihid nu kaku, saluimeng sananay nu bihidan, misakapah tu bihitan, tatenga isu haw sananay atu mikilim tu udip, saadidien nu imian bihid nu sakasitineng u milakuuytay tu bihid a kakuan atu mikilim tu udip a gigicuan. . bihid ku sakasitineng u aydaay nu ten-naw sakakaay a gigicuan, u sakay cilekayan tu sakasitineng nu picidekan a gigicuan, sakay cilecilekayan " sakay tademaw" sipakayda i udip nu picidekan ku sakakenis tu cilekayan. sakay picidekan nu cilakay nu gigicuan tu sapikinkiw a cilekay picidekan pasu bihid, lima, kapal, mata, salengacay nu mataan, suni "ngalngal", kaku nu udip, wayway nu udip " mahida u nipituktukan tu ten-naw a icelang atu wenpu, nipisulitan", sakalecad nu gigicuan u bihid tu sakasitineng, lima sakasitinengan, lima sakasitinengan, mata sakasitinengan, salengac nu sakasitinengan, suni sakasitinengan, kaku nu udip a sakasitinengan, nipituktuk a sakasitinengan, sulit sakasitinengan. hicasa ku pakunida hananay, sakatineng mahida malecad atu tademaw, papicumud u udip tu sapicukaymas a canancanan nu sakalecad. mahida u bihid tu sakatineng, u tademaw sipakayda tu nipiadih tu bihidan nu nikakenihan atu sapilucek tu udip, duma satu sapakayda tu lihalay nu sakasitinengan idaw henay ku sakayngalngal nu sakasitinengan, wayway nu udip, sulit nu lima, sakay mata tu sakasitinengan sakacaay sa namin kasalihalay, ita u tademaw atu cilekay caay piala tu mahiniay nu picidekan a masacacayan. . caay kaw kakatinengan a picidekan tu sakasitineng, mahiniay caay kahinabelih ku tademaw, nu mahiniay caay kaw sapidateng nutaw caay ka hinapacebaan. sakay bihid nu sakasitinengn a picidekan, sipakayda i takelalay misasing kay maala ku kaku nu bihid, caay kahida u lima atu mata ku sakasitineng, amicukaymas tu ten-ce-ya-li ku sapikinsa tu lima, hakiya micukaymas tu hung-way-sin miala tu mata nu kakuan, mahiniay nu picidekan hina kaalaan nu tademaw, hakiya taneng pacebaan nutaw amica u bihid ku sakasitineng nika yadah henay ku caayay pikikaka tu mahiniay, nika ci nida idaw ku sakautiihan. . kalawlawan Áą≠Ť≠į amica kunikalihalay u bihid ku sakasitinengan, nika yadah tu ku sakatalawan nu nai'ay a ancinan atu sakay udip nu wendayan, macunus nu aydaay nu bihid ku sakasitineng caay kaw malucekay, nisausian nu mahiniay a kikayan caay kaw malucekay, hina patelac, kainai'an tu sakay hulican atu sakay tademawan nu lucekan, idaw ku midebungay nu nikasasakamuen, atu sihu paceba sa micukaymas tu mahiniay a gigicuan, anu sipakayda tu sicumian mikawaw, a yadah ku masahicahicaay nu wendayan. .

¶ukajmas tu sakak…ônisan tu bińßid nu tad…ômaw aadińßan nu wajwaj mir~…ĺińßida tu udip a t…ônnaw nu gigi ¶uan. . sasiŇč…ônanaj ku sakasitin…ôŇč nu kikaj ******* najat…ôn nu imian bińßid tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan tu sakasitin…ôŇč nu pi ¶id…ôkan a gigi ¶uan, sakaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ô ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan " sakaj tad…ômaw" sipakajda i udip nu pi ¶id…ôkan ku sakak…ônis tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan. sakaj pi ¶id…ôkan nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu sakasitin…ôŇčan, suni sakasitin…ôŇčan, kaku nu udip a sakasitin…ôŇčan, nipituktuk a sakasitin…ôŇčan, sur~…ĺit sakasitin…ôŇčan. ńßi ¶asa ku pakunida ńßananaj, sakatin…ôŇč mańßida mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu tad…ômaw, papi ¶umud u udip tu sapi ¶ukajmas a ¶anan ¶anan nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. mańßida u bińßid tu sakatin…ôŇč, u tad…ômaw sipakajda tu nipiadińß tu bińßidan nu nikak…ônińßan atu sapir~…ĺu ¶…ôk tu udip, duma satu sapakajda tu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu sakasitin…ôŇčan idaw ńß…ônaj ku sakajŇčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ nu sakasitin…ôŇčan, wajwaj nu udip, sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺima, sakaj mata tu sakasitin…ôŇčan saka ¶aaj sa namin kasar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, ita u tad…ômaw atu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ¶aaj piar~…ĺa tu mańßiniaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan a masa ¶a ¶ajan. . ¶aaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan a pi ¶id…ôkan tu sakasitin…ôŇč, mańßiniaj ¶aaj kańßinab…ôr~…ĺińß ku tad…ômaw, nu mańßiniaj ¶aaj kaw sapidat…ôŇč nutaw ¶aaj ka ńßinapa ¶…ôbaan. sakaj bińßid nu sakasitin…ôŇčn a pi ¶id…ôkan, sipakajda i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj misasiŇč kaj maar~…ĺa ku kaku nu bińßid, ¶aaj kańßida u r~…ĺima atu mata ku sakasitin…ôŇč, ami ¶ukajmas tu t…ôn- ¶…ô-ja-r~…ĺi ku sapikinsa tu r~…ĺima, ńßakija mi ¶ukajmas tu ńßuŇč-waj-sin miar~…ĺa tu mata nu kakuan, mańßiniaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan ńßina kaar~…ĺaan nu tad…ômaw, ńßakija tan…ôŇč pa ¶…ôbaan nutaw ami ¶a u bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇč nika jadańß ńß…ônaj ku ¶aajaj pikikaka tu mańßiniaj, nika ¶i nida idaw ku sakautiińßan. . kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ** ami ¶a kunikar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj u bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇčan, nika jadańß tu ku sakatar~…ĺawan nu nai Ē~ °aj a an ¶inan atu sakaj udip nu w…ôndajan, ma ¶unus nu ajdaaj nu bińßid ku sakasitin…ôŇč ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj, nisausian nu mańßiniaj a kikajan ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj, ńßina pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶, kainai Ē~ °an tu sakaj ńßur~…ĺi ¶an atu sakaj tad…ômawan nu r~…ĺu ¶…ôkan, idaw ku mid…ôbuŇčaj nu nikasasakamu…ôn, atu sińßu pa ¶…ôba sa mi ¶ukajmas tu mańßiniaj a gigi ¶uan, anu sipakajda tu si ¶umian mikawaw, a jadańß ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu w…ôndajan. .
